hooks.prompt: Review the code changes made in this conversation. For each file that was modified: (1) What was the intent — what problem was being solved? (2) Did the changes introduce any structural risk — deep nesting, large functions, tight coupling, or unclear logic? (3) Rate the session's overall impact on code health: improved, neutral, or degraded. Respond as JSON with keys: intent, files_modified (list of {path, intent, risk_assessment}), overall_impact.
